source_note: Manual consolidation of the console diagnostics observed during the aborted Step113 full-FSI run. The driver aborted before a persistent diagnostics time series was written.
geometry: mirrored duct-flap proxy with two flaps

failure.error: RuntimeError: driver diagnostics contains NaN or Inf
failure.interpretation: The official-material two-flap proxy is structurally unstable under the uncapped/unstabilized full-FSI settings; deformation blows up before the 50-step transient can complete.
